name: SCC_CreateContractAuthenticationRes_ISO
title: SCC_CreateContractAuthenticationRes_ISO
syntax: long SCC_CreateContractAuthenticationRes_ISO ( byte SessionID[], char ResponseCode[], long EVSEProcessing )
description: Creates a Contract Authentication Response message for sending.

parameters.name: SessionID
parameters.description: 8-byte long SessionID of SCC connection, range: 0 - 0xFF FF FF FF FF FF FF FF.
